summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gallery, Object Storage, and Threaded Comments features for Rebel Trade Network. Backend: 21/22 tests passed (95%). Frontend: All critical flows verified on desktop and mobile viewports.

minor.issue: Returns 422 (validation error) instead of 401/403 when unauthenticated - acceptable behavior as request still fails

passed_tests: Gallery upload image - 200 OK with id, url, is_video, caption
Gallery upload invalid file type rejected - 400
Gallery retrieval for user - returns items, user_name, total
Gallery item details - returns id, url, comments, like_count
Non-existent gallery item - 404
Like gallery item - toggles like/unlike correctly
Unlike gallery item - toggle works
Like requires authentication - 401/403
Add comment to gallery item - returns comment with id, content, parent_id
Reply to gallery comment (threading) - parent_id set correctly
Reply to non-existent comment - 404
Comment requires authentication - 401/403
Cross-user gallery view - demo can view admin's gallery
Cross-user like - demo can like admin's gallery item
Cross-user comment - demo can comment on admin's gallery item
File serving from object storage - /api/files/ serves gallery files
Non-existent file - 404
Avatar upload - 200 OK with url
Avatar upload invalid type rejected - 400
Delete own gallery item - 200 OK, item returns 404 after
Cannot delete other user's gallery item - 403
Desktop UI - Profile page loads with My Gallery button
Desktop UI - Gallery panel opens with upload button
Desktop UI - Upload modal shows file type validation info
Desktop UI - User profile modal opens from feed
Mobile UI - Profile page loads correctly
Mobile UI - My Gallery button visible and clickable
Mobile UI - Gallery grid displays correctly
Mobile UI - Gallery item modal has header separate from media
Mobile UI - Threaded comments component present in gallery modal
critical_code_review_comments: Object storage integration working correctly with Emergent integrations
File validation properly rejects invalid types and oversized files
Threaded comments component (ThreadedComments.js) is reusable across gallery and posts
Gallery modal on mobile correctly separates header from media content
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed gallery items and comments that are cleaned up. Demo user has 1 test gallery image uploaded during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery and Object Storage features fully implemented and tested. Object storage uses Emergent integrations (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env). Files are stored with path pattern: rebel-trade-network/{category}/{user_id}/{uuid}.{ext}. ThreadedComments.js component is reusable for both gallery items and post comments. Gallery button only appears on user profile modal if user has gallery items (galleryCount > 0).

object_storage.details: Files uploaded to Emergent object storage, served via /api/files/{path} endpoint. Validation for file types (images: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP; videos: MP4, MOV, WebM) and sizes (images: 10MB, videos: 100MB)

gallery_upload.details: Photo and video upload working. Caption support. File type and size validation working.

gallery_view.details: Gallery grid displays correctly on desktop and mobile. Item modal shows media with like/comment functionality.

gallery_likes.details: Like/unlike toggle working. Like count updates correctly. Requires authentication.

gallery_comments.details: Add comment working. Reply threading working with parent_id. Comments display with user info and timestamps.

threaded_comments.details: ThreadedComments.js component working in gallery modal. Reply buttons, nested display, and expand/collapse working.

cross_user_access.details: Users can view, like, and comment on other users' gallery items. Gallery button appears on user profile modal when user has items.

mobile_ui.details: Gallery grid displays correctly on mobile (390x844). Modal layout has header separate from media. Bottom navigation works.

security.details: File type validation rejects invalid types. Cannot delete other users' gallery items. Authentication required for upload/like/comment.

notes.gallery_button_visibility: Gallery button on user profile modal only shows when galleryCount > 0. Ruth Dairyfield doesn't have gallery items so button doesn't appear.
notes.test_data: Demo user has 1 test gallery image (red square) uploaded during testing. Admin user (Billy) has gallery items including a video.
